hero.eyebrow: UNSW Computer Science · iGPA 4.0 · Graduating Jun 2026
hero.subtitle: I build web apps and AI-powered tooling — Vue/React on the front, Python/FastAPI on the back, Docker in between. Currently interning at Cool AI.

blog.label: Writing
blog.headline: Notes on how agent systems actually work.
blog.description: I write down implementation-level observations from projects and source-code reading, especially where AI tools meet real runtime constraints.
blog.title: Agents are not chatbots: tool calls, context, and looped reasoning
blog.summary: A visual breakdown of how a Claude Code-style runtime turns model output into tool execution, context updates, and the next reasoning step.

runtime.title: Agents are not chatbots: tool calls, context, and looped reasoning
runtime.summary: A visual breakdown of how a Claude Code-style runtime turns model output into tool execution, context updates, and the next reasoning step.

multiAgent.title: Claude Code multi-agent: collaboration as a runtime protocol
multiAgent.summary: A deeper source-reading note on how Claude Code uses team config, task lists, mailboxes, agent lifecycles, permissions, and recovery to coordinate work.

features.label: Work & Projects
features.mockMateDescription: An AI interview training platform covering question generation, follow-ups, structured evaluation, history records, and resume-project technical drilling.

codexProfileManager.title: Codex Profile Manager
codexProfileManager.description: A small CLI helper for keeping multiple ChatGPT and API-key Codex logins side by side, with each profile running from its own isolated CODEX_HOME.

webFontSwitcher.title: web-font-switcher
webFontSwitcher.description: A Chrome extension that applies different fonts based on page text language, with live previews and custom font support.

about.label: About
about.body: I'm a Computer Science student at UNSW Sydney, graduating June 2026. I've interned at Graviti building the marketing site for diffus.me (Vue 3, Nuxt 3, FastAPI), and I'm currently at Cool AI working on model inference APIs and Docker-based deployment pipelines for multimodal models. Outside of work, I served as Director of IT at UNSW AISoc, where I built a Discord meeting-to-task system in Next.js 15 and FastAPI.
